settings.heroSubtitle: Serving families in Flanders, NJ with a caring Islamic learning environment.
settings.schoolHours: Pre-K & KG: 8:45 AM - 3:00 PM | Grade 1+: 8:00 AM - 3:00 PM

about.title: About IEC School
about.body: IEC School provides a nurturing environment where students grow academically, spiritually, and socially. Our program combines core academic subjects with Islamic Studies, Quran, and Arabic.

mission.title: Mission and Vision
mission.body: Our mission is to guide students to become confident model citizens who demonstrate academic excellence, strong character, and Islamic values.

required-documents.title: Required Documents
required-documents.body: Birth certificate, immunization records, previous school records, completed application, and emergency contact information.

uniform-policy.title: Uniform Policy
uniform-policy.body: Students are expected to dress modestly and follow the school uniform guidelines. Detailed uniform information can be updated in data/site.json.

admissions.title: Admissions
admissions.body: Registration is available on a first come, first served basis. Families are encouraged to submit the admissions form early to secure placement.

programs.title: Academic Curriculum
programs.description: Core subjects designed to build strong literacy, math, science, and social studies skills.

programs.title: Islamic Studies
programs.description: Daily lessons that help students understand Islamic beliefs, manners, and practices.

programs.title: Quran & Arabic
programs.description: Structured Quran recitation, memorization support, and Arabic language foundations.

programs.title: Community & Character
programs.description: A welcoming school community focused on confidence, service, and good citizenship.

faqs.question: What grades does IEC School serve?
faqs.answer: Update this answer in data/site.json with the current grades offered by the school.

faqs.question: What are the school hours?
faqs.answer: Office hours and school hours can be edited in data/site.json.

faqs.question: How do I enroll my child?
faqs.answer: Complete the admissions form or contact the school office for next steps.
